verdict.rationale: Full-forward served-spec (M=6 verify, K=5) STRUCTURALLY breaks strict #319 on the SHIP vLLM 0.22.0 against a CLEAN cross-start floor (ref==ref2) -- so the verify-width spec break is REAL on the version we ship, NOT a dev307 numerics artifact. lm_head GEMM is bit-identical M=1 vs M=6 on BOTH versions, so the break is BODY-driven (attention + body int4 GEMMs), not the head. The strict-#319 spec blocker stands -> recompute-rescue (stark #669) or a width-invariant config (land #680) remains necessary to ship the spec lever.
